seoIntroTitle: Sri Lanka Tours with Local Experts
seoIntro: CEYLON JOJO TRAVElS offers private tours, chauffeur driver services and tailor-made holiday packages across Sri Lanka. Explore Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Yala safari and stunning beaches with experienced local guides.
homeServices.heading: Premium Sri Lanka Tours, Travel & Chauffeur Services
homeServices.intro: We offer complete Sri Lanka travel solutions including private tours, chauffeur driven round tours, hotel reservations, train tickets, and customized holiday packages across the island’s top destinations like Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Yala, Galle, and Colombo.
homeServices.guide.title: Multilingual Private Chauffeur Guides in Sri Lanka
homeServices.guide.desc: Travel across Sri Lanka with professional multilingual chauffeur guides who speak English, German, Russian, Polish, and French. Our expert local drivers provide safe, comfortable, and personalized private tours covering top destinations like Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Yala, and Galle.
homeServices.tickets.title: Train Tickets & Attraction Entrance Booking
homeServices.tickets.desc: We arrange Ella train tickets, safari bookings, and entrance tickets to top Sri Lanka attractions including Sigiriya Rock Fortress, Yala National Park, Temple of the Tooth, and more for a hassle-free travel experience.
homeServices.hotels.title: Hotel Booking & Tailor-Made Accommodation
homeServices.hotels.desc: We provide handpicked hotel bookings in Sri Lanka ranging from luxury resorts and boutique hotels to budget guesthouses, ensuring comfort, great locations, and the best value for your Sri Lanka holiday package.
features.pricing.title: Affordable Sri Lanka Tour Packages
features.pricing.desc: We provide affordable private Sri Lanka tours, tailor-made holiday packages, and chauffeur-driven tours designed to fit every budget without compromising comfort, safety, and quality travel experiences.
features.service.title: Professional Chauffeur Guides & Personalized Service
features.service.desc: Our experienced chauffeur guides and travel experts ensure a safe, comfortable, and personalized Sri Lanka travel experience, covering top destinations like Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Yala, and Galle.
features.experts.title: Trusted Sri Lanka Travel Experts
features.experts.desc: As a trusted local Sri Lanka tour operator, we welcome travelers worldwide and offer unforgettable experiences including cultural tours, wildlife safaris, beach holidays, and luxury private round tours across Sri Lanka.

seo.title: Sri Lanka Tours with Private Driver & Tailor-Made Holidays
seo.subtitle: Discover the best of Sri Lanka with customized private tours, experienced chauffeur guides, and unforgettable travel experiences across the island.
seo.why.title: Why Visit Sri Lanka?
seo.why.desc: Sri Lanka is known as the Pearl of the Indian Ocean, offering a mix of culture, wildlife, beaches and mountains. From ancient temples to tropical coastlines, it is one of the most diverse travel destinations in Asia.
seo.places.title: Best Places to Visit
seo.packages.title: Sri Lanka Tour Packages
seo.packages.desc: Choose from 4-day, 5-day, 7-day and 10-day private tours or customize your own itinerary. Our tours include transport, driver guide and flexible travel plans.
